title: Kol (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kol''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Kol Huro]]''', an astronomical object
*'''[[Kol Iben]]''', a [[gas giant]]
*'''[[Kol Gresh]],''' a [[Twi'lek]] who owned the [[Blue Tooka]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Arteles Kol]]''', a [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] commander
*'''[[Heta Kol]]''', [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]
*'''[[Kalien Kol]]''', a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]
*'''[[Kol Attan]]''', a [[Yevetha]]
*'''[[Kol Eyttyn]]''', [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*'''[[Kol Kotha]]''', a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]]
*'''[[Kol Nurn]]''', an [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]]
*'''[[Kol Skywalker]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*'''[[Kol Yabu]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Kol Atorn system/Legends|Kol Atorn system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
**'''[[Kol Atorn]]''', an astronomical object in the Kol Atorn system
*'''[[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro system]]''', a star system in the Outer Rim Territories
